name: New Demo Idea / Feature Request
about: Suggest a new demo or an enhancement to an existing one
title: "[IDEA] <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Demo / Feature Summary

<!-- A clear, one-sentence description of the new demo or feature you'd like to see. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why would this demo be useful? What problem does it solve or what concept does it illustrate? -->

## Proposed Demo Description

<!--
Describe the demo in more detail:
- What does the user do? (e.g. speaks into a microphone, provides a video file, etc.)
- What does the demo output? (e.g. translated subtitles, audio, text in the terminal)
- Which Gemini Live API features does it showcase?
-->

## Suggested Folder Name

<!-- Follow the `lowercase-hyphen-separated` convention under `demos/`. e.g. `demos/live-subtitle-overlay` -->

## Are You Willing to Implement This?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to work on this myself and open a PR.
- [ ] I can help with testing / feedback, but not implementation.
- [ ] Just a suggestion — happy for someone else to pick it up.

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, links to relevant Gemini API docs, related issues, or any other helpful information. -->
